_about: Frozen snapshot of score_manual_quality() output for the manuals in tests/fixtures/manuals/. Pinned so external contributors can verify the README claim 'production runs the same code that's visible here' — install siglume-agent-core from PyPI, run pytest -k parity, and the snapshot must match. If a code change drifts the score, this test fails: either fix the regression, or intentionally update the snapshot in the same PR.
